---
title: "タイトル"
pagetitle: "Rmarkdown設定テンプレート"
# subtitle: "サブタイトル"
# date: "`r Sys.time()`"
# abstract: "このドキュメントのアブストラクトをここに入力します。"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 5
    toc_float: FALSE
    number_sections: TRUE
    code_folding: "show"
    highlight: "zenburn"
    theme: "flatly"
    css: ../style.css
    md_extensions: -ascii_identifiers
---

```{r SETUP, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo       = TRUE,
                      message    = FALSE,
                      warning    = FALSE,
                      out.width  = 800,
                      out.height = 600,
                      fig.align  = "center",
                      dev        = "ragg_png")
```

<div class="update-right">
UPDATE: `r Sys.time()`
</div>

<div class="box">
- comment here
- comment here
- comment here
</div>

```{r}
library(prophet)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

# Chapter
comment here

## Chapter2

```{r}
print("hello R")
```

## ktable
`ktable()`はこんなかんじ。

```{r}
knitr::kable(mtcars[1:1,], 
             digits = 4,
             align = "llllccccrrrr",
             caption = "An example table caption.")
```

これは$\alpha$です。

$$
\begin{eqnarray}
|x|
 =
  \begin{cases}
    x & ( x \geqq 0 ) \\
    -x & ( x \lt 0 )
  \end{cases}
\end{eqnarray}
$$

![Sunset Image](/Users/aki/Documents/statistical_note/note00/sunset.jpg "Sunset Image")
<img src="/Users/aki/Documents/statistical_note/note00/sunset.jpg" width="400">
